untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise identification of consolidation pattern boundaries, failure candlestick detection, and consolidated volume thresholds. The specific pattern logic (consolidation low/high, failure candle confirmation, midpoint reclaim) cannot be expressed with simple indicator comparisons. Required: custom pattern recognition for consolidation zones and failure detection logic not available in standard indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using trend (SMA_20), volume confirmation (vol_ratio_20 > 1.5), and pivot points as consolidation proxies. However, the core signal depends on identifying failed breakouts from consolidation ranges and trapped trader mechanics, which requires multi-bar pattern analysis beyond the scope of single-condition rules. THRESHOLD_NEEDED parameters remain unspecified in source material.
